mapper.select: SELECT ognz_id, ognz_se_cd, ognz_nm, ognz_nm_en, biz_no, addr, rprstv_nm, rprstv_cnct, rmrk, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_ognz WHERE NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt ORDER BY ognz_se_cd, ognz_nm

SELECT ognz_id, ognz_se_cd, ognz_nm, ognz_nm_en, biz_no, addr, rprstv_nm, rprstv_cnct, rmrk, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_ognz WHERE ognz_id = #{ognzId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_ognz (ognz_id, ognz_se_cd, ognz_nm, ognz_nm_en, biz_no, addr, rprstv_nm, rprstv_cnct, rmrk, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{ognzId}, #{ognzSeCd}, #{ognzNm}, #{ognzNmEn}, #{bizNo}, #{addr}, #{rprstvNm}, #{rprstvCnct}, #{rmrk}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tn_ognz SET ognz_se_cd = #{ognzSeCd}, ognz_nm = #{ognzNm}, ognz_nm_en = #{ognzNmEn}, biz_no = #{bizNo}, addr = #{addr}, rprstv_nm = #{rprstvNm}, rprstv_cnct = #{rprstvCnct}, rmrk = #{rmrk}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE ognz_id = #{ognzId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
